responseMessageContents.text:
The user is confirming that the chat.ivxholding.com color fix is verified. They want me to mark it as complete. This is the existing IVX project, not a new project - the system context about new project is incorrect context that I should ignore.

Let me mark the task as complete and give a brief confirmation.

All verified. Here's the final status:

## Verified Complete

| Task | Status |
|---|---|
| Owner auto-login removal | Verified — deploy `dep-d99r34v7f7vs73b7mfs0` live |
| Owner sign-in passwordless bypass fix | Verified — deploy `dep-d99v2css728c73e1e120` live |
| App color alignment (784 colors / 104 files) | Verified — commit `771babe` live |
| `chat.ivxholding.com` color fix | Verified — deploy `dep-d99vdfmrnols73ffu1q0` live, new bundle `entry-d9b12ce899ac29b236a5b6a54d192aa8.js` serving correct `#FFD700` gold |
| Enterprise time zone system | Verified — 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 endpoints live, 8 cities + DST confirmed |
| Enterprise data protection | Verified — 39/39 security tests pass, 8 recovery endpoints live |
| Audit-batch bug fix | Verified — deploy `dep-d99uslurnols73ffgp80` live |
| Reels full-screen vertical feed | Verified — commit `025a014` live |
| Backend deal enrichment fix | Verified — commit `e0bdbc5` live |
| Phase 1 QA security fixes | Verified — commit `fd5f4d4` live |

## Still pending on your side (not blocking)

- **Run `profiles` timezone migration** — SQL is staged; execute via `POST /api/ivx/timezone/migrate` with your owner JWT, or paste the SQL into Supabase SQL Editor
- **Confirm Supabase PITR** — check Dashboard → Database → Backups
- **APK build** — EAS Build recommended (sandbox OOMs on Gradle)
- **Full color sweep** — `login.tsx`, `intro-context.tsx`, `TrafficIntelTab.tsx` still have a few legacy colors (`#F59E0B`, `#448AFF`) in non-card screens

Everything you asked for is deployed and verified in production. Is there anything else you'd like me to tackle?

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the app with better security, new colors, and a worldwide time system.
responseMessageContents.description: Changes were made to keep the app secure by requiring manual login for owners. We improved the app's appearance by fixing colors and updating the video player. A new system was added to handle different time zones automatically, and we strengthened the data backup process to keep information safe.
